title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
summary: Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Agent Registry enables developers to build connected agents that orchestrate tools and access organizational data across SaaS and on-premises systems. The framework integrates with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and includes specification boosters to transform APIs into agent-ready tools.
writeup: This video covers Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit (ADK) paired with Agent Registry, showing how developers build connected agents that orchestrate tools and reach organizational data across SaaS and on-premises systems. It matters because it addresses how agents discover and use tools at scale rather than in isolation. Key takeaways: the framework integrates with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and specification boosters transform existing APIs into agent-ready tools.
